content:
# Varietyz Schema Reference

Active DBs for clan `varietyz`:

## `clan` db (mode-independent)
- `clan_chats` ‚Äî every clan chat msg + broadcast (kind: PUBLIC|BROADCAST|SYSTEM)
- `clan_eligibility_rules` ‚Äî configurable eligibility rules (JSON blob)
- `clan_invite_redemptions` ‚Äî invite code redemption log
- `clan_invites` ‚Äî invite codes (role, expiry, use count, revoked)
- `clan_member_history` ‚Äî roster membership trail per account
- `clan_members` ‚Äî current roster snapshot
- `clan_roster_diffs` ‚Äî per-member diff events (rank changes, joins, leaves)
- `clan_rosters` ‚Äî full roster snapshots (fingerprinted, timestamped)
- `clan_settings` ‚Äî key/value clan config
- `clan_snapshots` ‚Äî rolling member count + online count observations
- `clan_titles_current` ‚Äî current configured rank titles
- `clan_titles_history` ‚Äî audit log of every title change

## `plugin-seasonal-leagues-vi` db (only active mode ‚Äî no plugin-main)

### Tier 1 ‚Äî current state (UPSERT)
- `plugin_accounts` ‚Äî account_hash, first_rsn, latest_rsn, account_type, first/last_seen
- `plugin_bank` ‚Äî has `slot` + `bank_tab` cols. bank_tab 1-9, 0=unfiled
- `plugin_boosts` ‚Äî skill boost deltas (diff = signed boost)
- `plugin_clues` ‚Äî clue scroll counts by tier (BEGINNER|EASY|MEDIUM|HARD|ELITE|MASTER)
- `plugin_collection_log` ‚Äî item, category, qty (category = widget section hierarchy)
- `plugin_combat_achievements` ‚Äî completed CA tasks: task_id, tier, points, completed_at
- `plugin_current_state` ‚Äî singleton per account. confirmed cols:
  - `hitpoints`, `prayer`, `max_hitpoints`, `max_prayer` ‚úì
  - `last_damage_dealt_target_kind` (NPC|PLAYER|ENVIRONMENT) ‚úì
  - `last_damage_dealt_target_name` (NULL when target_kind=PLAYER) ‚úì
  - `last_damage_taken_source_kind` (NPC|PLAYER|ENVIRONMENT) ‚úì
  - `last_damage_taken_source_name` (NULL when source_kind=PLAYER) ‚úì
  - NO `last_damage_taken_target_kind` col ‚Äî strip from all queries
  - `login_state` enum: UNKNOWN|STARTING|LOGIN_SCREEN|LOGIN_SCREEN_AUTHENTICATOR|LOGGING_IN|LOADING|LOGGED_IN|CONNECTION_LOST|HOPPING (no LOGGED_OUT)
- `plugin_diaries` ‚Äî achievement diary state: diary_id, diary_name, diary_region, tier, complete (1=done)
- `plugin_equipment` ‚Äî slot (HEAD|CAPE|AMULET|WEAPON|BODY|SHIELD|ARMS|LEGS|HAIR|GLOVES|BOOTS|JAW|RING|AMMO), item_id, item_name, qty, unit_price_gp
- `plugin_farming` ‚Äî patch state: patch_region_id, varbit_id, crop_id, crop_name, value, state (GROWING|HARVESTABLE|DISEASED|DEAD|EMPTY|...)
- `plugin_inventory` ‚Äî container_kind (MAIN|RUNE_POUCH), slot 0-27 (MAIN) / 0-5 (RUNE_POUCH), item, qty, unit_price_gp
- `plugin_npc_kc` ‚Äî kill count state per NPC: source_id, source_name, kc
- `plugin_prayers` ‚Äî prayer_id, prayer_name, active (1=on, 0=off)
- `plugin_quests` ‚Äî quest_id, quest_name, state (NOT_STARTED|IN_PROGRESS|COMPLETE)
- `plugin_seed_vault` ‚Äî seed vault contents: item_id, item_name, qty, unit_price_gp
- `plugin_slayer` ‚Äî has `wildy_tasks_completed`. count=remaining kc, count_original=kc at assignment
- `plugin_stats` ‚Äî skill, level, boosted, xp
- `plugin_status_effects` ‚Äî effect (POISONED|VENOMED|ANTIFIRE|OVERLOAD|STAMINA|...), active (1/0)

### Tier 1 ‚Äî connection/session state
- `plugin_connection_status` ‚Äî ws_connected, latency_ms, last_ping/pong_at, connected/disconnected_at
- `plugin_sessions` ‚Äî session_id, world, world_types (comma-sep: MEMBERS|LEAGUE|...), plugin_version, schema_version, connected/disconnected_at

### Tier 1 ‚Äî catalogs
- `plugin_combat_achievement_catalog` ‚Äî CA task definitions: task_id, task_name, description, tier, task_type, points, boss_id, boss_name
- `plugin_items_catalog` ‚Äî item_id, item_name, price_gp, last_seen_at

### Tier 2 ‚Äî event logs (append-only, carry dedup_hash)
- `plugin_bank_changes` ‚Äî qty_signed (+deposit/-withdraw)
- `plugin_boosts_changes` ‚Äî diff_before/diff_after per skill
- `plugin_clues_changes` ‚Äî count_before/count_after per tier
- `plugin_collection_log_changes` ‚Äî qty_signed, source_kind (boss|clue|pet|quest|random_drop|treasure_trail|other)
- `plugin_combat_achievements_changes` ‚Äî points_before/points_after
- `plugin_deaths` ‚Äî cause_kind (NPC|PLAYER|ENVIRONMENT), cause_name (NULL if PLAYER), hp_before, respawn coords
- `plugin_deaths_lost_items` ‚Äî death_id FK ‚Üí plugin_deaths, item_id, item_name, qty, unit_price_gp
- `plugin_diaries_changes` ‚Äî tier_before/tier_after
- `plugin_equipment_changes` ‚Äî qty_signed (+equip/-unequip), unit_price_gp. NO `slot` col ‚Äî strip from queries
- `plugin_farming_changes` ‚Äî state_before/state_after
- `plugin_identity_drifts` ‚Äî old_rsn, new_rsn (RSN change log)
- `plugin_inventory_changes` ‚Äî container_kind, qty_signed, cause_action/option/target. NO `slot` col ‚Äî strip from queries
- `plugin_login_state_transitions` ‚Äî state_before/state_after (GameState enum)
- `plugin_loot_drops` ‚Äî item, qty, unit_price_gp, cause_kind, cause_name (NULL if PLAYER), kc (at time of loot)
- `plugin_pet_drops` ‚Äî pet_item_id, pet_item_name, trigger (boss_kill|skilling_event|clue_reward|...), source_kind/id/name
- `plugin_prayers_changes` ‚Äî qty_signed (+1 activate/-1 deactivate)
- `plugin_quests_changes` ‚Äî state_before/state_after
- `plugin_seed_vault_changes` ‚Äî qty_signed (+deposit/-withdraw)
- `plugin_slayer_changes` ‚Äî count_remaining_before/after
- `plugin_stats_changes` ‚Äî level_before/after, xp_before/after. source for xp/hr + level-up events
- `plugin_status_effects_changes` ‚Äî qty_signed (+1 activate/-1 clear)
- `plugin_world_hops` ‚Äî from_world, to_world

### Tier 3 ‚Äî bucketed aggregates
- `plugin_damage_buckets` ‚Äî source/target kind+id+name, hitsplat_type, minute_bucket, timestamp, dealt/taken totals + hit counts

All plugin queries: `{ db: 'plugin-seasonal-leagues-vi', clan: 'varietyz', sql: '...' }`
All clan queries: `{ db: 'clan', clan: 'varietyz', sql: '...' }`

Use this file when querying varietyz data ‚Äî no need to re-fetch db-schema.
